entry.title: Re: Story filter becomes open for user modification after...
entry.content:
After a chat with SAP expert, we came to a conclusion that this is indeed current (yet unexpected) behaviour of the API.

I created an Improvement Request regarding this issue. If anyone has a similar need, please vote under the link below, so SAP may fix it.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330671/

entry.title: Re: Create ticket for all the unassociated email in C4C
entry.content: We have implemented the same solution but we are facing an issue, unable to link inbound email to the newly created ticket timeline. Were you able to link email with ticket so that email is visible in timeline view in ticket? If yes, please provide some pointers to show inbound email in the ticket also

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table control.
entry.content: Yes, But I was just hoping someone would. When they can. Thanks.

entry.title: Default Values in Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi everybody,
one of our customers wants to use Default Values in Build Work Zone, standard edition according to the documentation here. However the request for saving the default values in the settings dialog

https://sandbox.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/UI2/INTEROP/PersContainers

results in an 404 Not Found, which is obvious, because the request is not routed to the S4 backend. Does anyone have an idea how to route this request, that is outside any of our apps, correctly? An idea that came in our mind is a Launchpad plugin, but we think there must be an easier solution. 

Does anyone have experience with Default Values in Build Work Zone and already solved this issue?

Any kind of help is appreciated. 

Best regards,

Marcel

entry.title: ABAP FTP_CONNECT with anonymous access
entry.content:
Hi,

I try to connect to an FTP server using ABAP. I want to connect with user/password, so I use the user anonymous with an email-Adresse as password.

The code looks like the following:

 

call function 'FTP_CONNECT'
  exporting
    user            = 'anonymous'
    password        = 'my@email.com'
    host            =  '95.31.30.236'
    rfc_destination = 'SAPFTP'
  importing
    handle          = hdl.

 

However, I when execute the programm, I get get the error

User anonymous is not allowed on 95.31.30.236.

But connecting to this server server using FileZilla with the same credentials, works well. So anonymous connection is allowed.

 

Any suggestions how to connect via ABAP using anonymous user?

Thx!

entry.title: Re: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overti...
entry.content: Hi Volker, Thank you for your confirmation. Could you please clarify your point of view?

entry.title: Re: To get change report which user changed sales order user profile status and release order.
entry.content:
Hi, I found Solution. Described as below. Please correct if there is anything needs to be corrected.

1: Find Object Number from VBAK table by entering Sale Order Number

2:Enter Object Number in JCDS table and you will get Status/Change Number/User/Date/Time.

entry.title: Re: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migra...

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content: First of all, I would like to extend my greetings to you, Mr. David. I was honored to receive an email from you, but I followed these steps since I received the email containing the free code, but it did not accept activation. This is the problem. I have attached a picture of the problem that appears during activation. Please, Mr. David, help me activate the code so that I can achieve my dream of taking the exam and succeeding.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud and Bots Filtering
entry.content:
Hi @kai_unewisse,

By experience, all strategies you're mentioned are not efficients. When Bot is not declaring itself, they're often using hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) to host their bots army. In this case, IP ranges can be changed easily. 

And SAP Commerce Cloud disallow list is not designed to be updated frequently. It is more to allow only IP from CDN, or/and from Employees, or/and to block an entire geographical plate (as Asia for example).

Lightweight firewall into SAP Commerce (Tomcat) won't be efficient. It is too far in downstream. You will have to setup larger hardware to support the workload / processing...

Unfortunately, modern CDN is the only serious option.

entry.title: Re: Default Values in Build Work Zone
entry.content: Hope that @Jocelyn_Dart could direct that to someone who could answer.

entry.title: Planning Profile and Actual cost posting in CO15
entry.content:
Hi all,

We use two planning profiles for calculating the cost. SAPALL and ZSAPALL. For Company code A we use SAPALL and for Company code B we use ZSAPALL. 

When we maintain activity prices for a plant in company code B using ZSAPALL, values are hitting in SAPALL profile as well. Before maintaining the activity prices, i did maintain the ZSAPALL profile using KP04.

Issue is : my overhead costs in ZSAPALL profile is 0.5 INR. But in SAPALL profile it shows as 0 since thats in EUR.

While doing confirmation for a production order in company code B, i am facing "error in determining actual costs for the order". 

While running the costing in CK11N, system picks up the planning profile ZSAPALL, but while doing production order confirmation, it refers to SAPALL profile. How to change that ?

Please guide.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Code comparison in 2 systems using CCLM
entry.content:
HI SAP Support,
We have setup CCLM in our project and we would like to know if there is an option in CCLM to compare custom code in 2 different systems and displays the results?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Code comparison in 2 systems using CCLM
entry.content:
CityModel tile in the CCM WorkCenter would be helpful in your case. Although City model gives overview on custom code in each system, it does not allow comparison of two different system at the same time.
Please refer to this documentation on CCM : https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/e/pdf/preview/embed/BQWpoPm?ltr=a
On page 31 you can find more information on CityModel
I don't think we have any tile that is just for comparing like that, I would say you also could probably use CCM reporting tile to check the same data for different systems.

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives...
entry.content:
NB: You will require the currency codes in the view: bkpf-waers and t001-waers

NB: field rfccur is related to amount fcsl, not dmbtr or wrbtr

entry.title: Re: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the...
entry.content: Look at report BUSSTART or use a where-used search on the class.

entry.title: Planned order not consuming inventory
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are creating a CIR and post MRP, for components it creates a planned order, but it do not consume existing stock, rather it creates planned order for whole quantity.

Please suggest settings we should do so that it should consume stock first and then create planned order if needed.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: Please send the WHOLE flow logic of screen 400 of program ZPROG1 and the WHOLE PAI module where you call transaction ZTRANS. You will find the flow logic at screen definition. It should start with "PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT". The code of the module starts with "MODULE ... INPUT." and ends with "ENDMODULE."

entry.title: Re: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumula...
entry.content: Hi sikindar, yes you are right, and this functionality is working and setup as standard. I am talking about particular wagetype(1000), which is being calculated into forms.

entry.title: 🔵 Using CAP and Generative AI Hub to call OData APIs that get real stuff done in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Discover how Generative AI and CAP come together to make working with complex backend systems a breeze. We'll guide you on how to get started with SAP Build Apps and your preferred IDE, demonstrate OData payload generation with SAP S/4HANA, and share a successful customer example that puts it all together in a productive solution.

Speaker: Frank Densborn and James Rapp

entry.title: Re: How can I Improve performance of Below code.
entry.content: Hi @AadivaramAbbulu ,  I suggest write a CDS for the tables and fields required -  CDHDR , CDPOS , USR21 , ADR6 . use appropriate joins to fetch all fields required and then use it in your report. It will improve the performance of the report rather than using loops and read statement and appending.

    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students

I have completed my first learning journey in SAP FICO and I awaiting my certification attempt

Thank you

Mohamed Mo'men

entry.title: Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null.
entry.content: I am creating a simple automation of outlook using this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-outlook-automation.html#6d46ac9d-1797-4178-808d-8438c019d13b . But i'm getting error "Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null. " when i'm testing the automation.

entry.title: Re: After running CVI synchronization - popup to confirm...
entry.content:
Look for

  • OSS notes such as 3416866 - Messages "Changes ... have not yet been confirmed" incorrectly displyed at creation of supplier or customer or 1238924 - Sensitive fields cannot be updated via BP synchronization 
  • Check your Customizing for 'Sensitive Fields'

Consider using another tool to upload data as direct insert in LFBK and KNBK seems to be insufficient, as well as improper use.

  • Which 'certified external tool' did you use?

entry.title: Re: Flow Function of the Month: Dismiss Keyboard 🏆
entry.content:
Indeed it would be nice, but as per my understanding of the current state of SAP Build Apps and the roadmap, it won't be coming anytime soon. 

My experience when working with a lot of input fields or even soft tabs, conditional renderers and lists is that I tend to offload all 'event management' to the logic canvas of the page rather than keeping logic on each component. So here is an overview of what I usually do: 
1. Let's take a login form: add email input field.
2. onBlur and onSubmitEditing events are wired up to a 'Trigger event' logic. 
3. On the page logic canvas I would add a 'Receive event' logic node with the name 'emailInputFinished'
4. Then on the email input I would trigger the 'emailInputFinished' event in my 'Trigger event' logic. 
5. This allows me to handle and maintain all the crucial logic on the page canvas and to have a good overview of what can go wrong. 

In this setup there is just one last thing that doesn't work out of the box and that is 'sending data over with the trigger event' node (such as the information of the component and the values), which has been a limitation for as long as long I'm using the tool. 😅 But that's solvable, if you use page or app level variables in your input fields. That solves most of these issues.

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
What exactly have you coded in the PBO logic?

  • Paste your relevant code, it should be some LOOP AT SCREEN / MODIFY SCREEN within a LOOP WITH CONTROL in PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT logic.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Task Types and Sources in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hallo @Jagmohan_Chawla 

I'm new in the ALM world.
I'll appreciate if you advise me  when do we use : User Story in task creation ?

And where can i see the different between User Story and Project Task, once i create a task

BR

Nati

entry.title: Re: Transfer price for group valuation in PO
entry.content: As per my understanding, only materials with price control S will have group valuation. If the material in receiver plant is assigned price control V, the price from sender company cannot become the group cost of the receiver side. Linux Gao.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] - Step-by-Step guide to activate your SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced
entry.content:
Hello @nageshcaparthy ,
Thank you for sharing. It's very good article, we could finish the SAP WZAE setup by using this document. I see everything perfect in steps, but could you please clarify few topics:

  • Why it's necessary have SAML for DWS? In our installation SAP WZAE works without SAML between IAS and DWS (but we deleted it after setup complition)
  • Trusting between subaccount and IAS - if we do it manually, we can select the SAML protocol for bundled application:

but in the way you have used the protocol is OpenID Connect for bundled application. Could you please clarify the difference?

BR, Slava

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lfs_cntrl> TYPE scxtab_column.

  LOOP AT sch_chain-cols ASSIGNING <lfs_cntrl>.
    IF <lfs_cntrl>-screen-name EQ 'GW_CHAIN_JOB-JOBNAME' OR <lfs_cntrl>-screen-name EQ 'GW_CHAIN_JOB-START_TIME' OR
      gw_chain_job-scheduled EQ gc_schedule .
      <lfs_cntrl>-screen-input = 1.
    ELSEIF gw_chain_job-scheduled EQ gc_scheduled.
      <lfs_cntrl>-screen-input = 0.
      ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

sch_chain is my table control and scheduled is my column 7 flag

The above code is within my PBO loop with table control

entry.title: SAC Planning Monitor Trace PLUGIN_ERROR
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

SAC planning model has two Import jobs and their Refresh is scheduled daily. Schedule time, as well as Last run for both import jobs is displayed in the screenshot below. Also, In Data Timeline panel you can see that today data was refreshed successfully.

However, if you look at System/Monitor Trace, you can see error regarding failed refresh (7:33h) right after first import job refresh was finished in model (7:21h). This pattern repeats almost every day. Does anyone know why this error appears and what it means? More importantly, is planning model being refreshed daily or not?

KR,

Marija

entry.title: S/4HANA for Public Cloud: error message "You do not have start authorization"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP Public Cloud Edition Professional Services and have encountered an issue that I am unable to resolve. I would appreciate any help or guidance regarding the error I am facing.

Here are the details of the error message:

When attempting to open a self-developed app in the test system, the following error messages appear: "You do not have start authorization R3TR IWSV ..." and "No authorization to access service group ..." (/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS 011). These error messages did not occur in the development system when the app is opened in the development system.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or knows how to resolve this? Any tips or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content: Hello @Kristian2, If the purpose is just to download the list of PO items and pass on to the 3PLs, kindly use the app 'Manage Purchase Orders' it has incoterms at both level. Now as I mentioned the purpose of every app will be unique which may or may not serve the purpose of each and every customer in a way they expects it to be. Now the purpose to provide such CDS views and extension point is to make sure that there is a possibility to extend for customer as per their need. Best Regards, Vijayendra

entry.title: Screen Personas : Change Cell Value In Table
entry.content:
I can read the data in the table as below, but I cannot change the cell value.
The screen does not change. The table is not editable.

if(session.idExists("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell"))
{
    session.utils.alert("Table exist");
    var table = session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell");
    var rowsCount = table.rowCount;
    session.utils.alert("Table Row Count:" + rowsCount);
 for(var index = 0; index < rowsCount; index ++){
     var cellValue = table.getCellValue(index, "FIT_TRA_ID");      
     //Cell value fills successfully.
     session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell").
     modifyCell(index,"SOURCE_CREATED_BY",cellValue);//Not Working
 }
}

But from a parametrization perspective, I think I didn't encounter any S/4HANA specific parameters. This was all basically in the area of general ABAP Platform parametrization.

entry.content:

please help me to validate Date format which is coming from source table or file  in SAP Datasphere.

Bala

entry.title: Re: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overti...
entry.content:
Hello Kahlid

your question was "but I’m looking for advice on whether there are other methods or solutions available to address this issue. "

And my answer was: that´s the way to go.

So, use this rule, detail it out and then you can sent an approval only when the system calculated overtime. Or if you have dedicated overtime time types than you can send them directly into approval with the single record approval. However, if you use for example only a working time time type and the system calculates the overtime portions, then you need to query the time valuation results in your rule to decide if a workflow should be send or not. Did you read the implementation guide? Not quite sure, but I think there is an example in it.

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
Re: Direct Debit Returns in Bank Statement
entry.content:
Hello Bohdan,

Thanks for the detailed explanation!

I am facing one issue, our client is using CODA format bank statements and the process is bank statement shows incoming payment as and when bank received direct debit mandate and when the direct debit is rejected, bank again sends it as rejected payment.

By the time rejection communicated, incoming payment already clears the interim account, now for the rejection there is no open item in interim account to reverse. I am facing challenge to automate this flow.

Any suggestion would be highly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Anusha

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
entry.content:
Hi @Harald_Stevens , thank you for your reply.
If I understand correctly, there is currently nothing specifically planned in the roadmap. Is that correct?
In the cloud, each application seems to have its own transport mechanism. I think it would be beneficial to have an integrated solution, especially for IBP and other applications.

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden
entry.content:
Hi there!

Are you inquiring as to the EC related field view within the biographical portlet area?

If so- we created a business rule (configure business rules) that only permissioned certain group members to have that field view and the log in user themselves (to prevent additional and unintended proxy visibility). It was conditional that if the user attempting to view as not a group member in those areas, they were not provisioned view/edit, etc. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
entry.content: Hi Harald, thank you for your reply. There is currently nothing planned in the roadmap for Cloud Transport. Is that correct? In the cloud, each application has kind of its own transport mechanism. I think it would be beneficial to have an integrated solution, especially for IBP and other applications.

Is there a single (or multiple) transaction that I can look into in order to see if connectivity works between those system?

Regards

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q2 2024
entry.content:
Hi all,

the Q3 2024 update to the navigator is now live - check out the details in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/release-navigator-for-sap-btp-what-s-new-in-q3-2024/ba-p/13856736

entry.title: Re: IBM MQ QA server not reachable from Cloud Connector
entry.content:
That means if you configure a TLS connection to server abc.mycorp.com then the server certificate obtained from this server also must be issued for SAN abc.mycorp.com. Reconfigure your target server address to some other valid alternative domain or IP address covered by the certificate SAN names or install a new appropriate TLS server certificate on peer side with additional SANs.

But if you are trying to establish a TLS connection to server abc.mycorp.com and the peer certificate only says "I'm valid for SAN's xyz.corp.net and IP 80.155.32.18" then this server is not trusted. This might even be a man-in-the-middle attack.

entry.title: Line Limit in Stories -SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

When selecting all months in the filter in the story, this message appears:


"Processing on the backend was interrupted due to too high a volume of data involved in intermediate calculations. To reduce data volume, check the following options:

1. Reduce the number of dimensions on the axes.

2. Reduce the number of exception aggregation dimensions.

3. Reduce the number of measurements/counts requested.

4. Add restrictive filters for dimensions that lie on an axis and/or for dimensions that can be, directly or indirectly, used as an exception aggregation dimension."

 

What should I do to unlimited the number of lines in the story in SAC planning?

entry.title: Re: Validation like committed qty not greather than avail...
entry.content: I need to set validation for same.

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into BoM and Production order S...
entry.content: Hi, Need to Details understanding into Production order as well.

entry.title: Re: Help creating a promotion in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
I managed to solve this, the trick is in the Action. Put the qualifying Products or Categories inside a CONTAINER. Important is to set the Quantity Per Order entry to 1

In the ACTIONS, add a "Target fixed price on partner products" action. Refer to the container name created in the Conditions. Here the trick is to set the Qualifying Product Containers to 0 and the Target Product Containers to 10

That is it, works like a charm. I got inspiration from this article 3245737 - How to set up promotion with products combination within one category - SAP for Me but I didn't need to do the double promotion they did there

Thanks and Regards

MD Manauwar

entry.title: Re: After running CVI synchronization - popup to confirm...
entry.content:
Hi Raymond, actually the issue was not on the migration tool, but in fact on the dual control principle and the customising that checks the changes on the customer and vendor, because they were identified as sensitive fields.

For anyone else that might have this topic in the future, this note helped. https://me.sap.com/notes/3018771/E

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA for Public Cloud: error message "You do not have start authorization"
entry.content: As an additional information, according to SAP note 3399748 the reason for the error message could be missing Business Batalog SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_TST. And according to SAP note 2807442 this Business Catalog does not exist in the quality system, only in the development system. But how to prevent this error then in the quality system?

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into BoM and Production order S...
entry.content:
Hi @nikunjmehta2290 ,

 

For production order details, Kindly I request you to refer the below mentioned link 👇https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/knowledge-exchange-b1-production-module/qaq-p/13856076

entry.title: What causes material to be stuck in 921?
entry.content:
We have a lot of inventory movement between 0002 and 0003 locations. By end of business day, It is nothing to have 5 to 10 materials numbers "stuck" in 921 even after transfers have been confirmed. The way our pick process is designed, negative balances in 921 generally occur when a pick has not been 100% confirmed. I understand 921 is a transitional location, creating both a negative balance in 921 and a positive balance in 0003. What would cause the negative balance to remain after the transfer has been confirmed?

Also, what causes positive balance to remain in 921 after a transfer is confirmed? 99% of the time, the original SUs are no longer in a 0002 location, but are physically in floor stock (0003). 

It is time consuming to check these each and every day, but its part of the job. If i had a better understanding of what would cause these balance to get "stuck" I might be able to devise ways to prevent or reduce these. I can also clarify more if needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Elastic Scaling of Application Servers
entry.content:
@FrankJentsch ,

I have question, can we utilize or share one ABAP Environment with multiple subaccounts within one global account. If possible how can we do that.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Handling SELECT OPTIONS in CDS using Table Function
entry.content: If you use a list of values as input, you could think of using an alternative could be using a (temporary) table that holds your values from the selection combined with a join

entry.title: Deleting data deleted in the source system with idoc in the target system
entry.content:
How can I delete a data that is deleted in the source system using idoc?

For example, let's say a DE definition is deleted from a data in a material table.
How can I ensure that this DE definition is deleted in the target system with IDOC?

entry.title: Re: Validation like committed qty not greather than avail...
entry.content: Yes if you can manage the parameter sounds good otherwise let me know will share you with parameter

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to get the list of all the existing sc...
entry.content: Is this a real answer? It's completely wrong.

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports - Issue with bold and can grow op...
entry.content:
'Can Grow' allows the object to grow vertically (more lines) -- not horizontally.

One option is to create a formula that combines both objects, and uses HTML syntax to conditionally apply bold to the first part.

But why not simply allocate the bold width by default? That would keep the next column vertically aligned.

entry.title: Re: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content:
I marked it as default and repopulated the tasks, following the steps from: https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/repopulate-task-cache 

 

 

But it not worked yet:

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024
entry.content: Excited about the SAP Business AI - 2nd Edition and the 3rd SITBLR events in 2024!

entry.title: Re: Speaker Registration Now Open for SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024 – Business AI Edit
entry.content: Excited about the SAP Business AI - 2nd Edition and the 3rd SITBLR events in 2024!

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
entry.content:
Hi @LuizF,

actually Cloud Transport Management is exactly the common transport solution which can (and should) be implemented by all SAP cloud solutions. However, the respective development teams are free in the planning and prioritization of this implementation. Unfortunately, this topic often receives a low priority when competing with new features in the solution itself, especially if there is already a transport solution of some kind.

If you have specific requirements for transporting content in one or several solutions I would propose to open a request on the customer influence site: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2400. This allows us to show the customer need to the corresponding development team helping to get a higher priority for the implementation. This is especially true if this request gets upvoted several times...

On the Cloud Transport Management roadmap for Q3/2024 you can find SAP Datasphere as newly offered solution (already available) and SAP Build Apps as planned. Here I am not quite sure if it is already available, it could also shift into Q4/2024. 
But you are correct, if we talk about SaaS solutions outside of SAP BTP we don't have concrete dates in out roadmap yet.

Kind regards
Harald

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports - Issue with bold and can grow op...
entry.content: Hi Ido, thanks for your input.

entry.title: change to Chart of Accounts Template
entry.content: Hello, How do I change to Chart of Accounts Template. Company Details > Basic Initialization > Chart of Accounts Template --> CATR. But this field is read-only and I can't change it. Can you please help?

entry.title: Re: Move the position of a UDF created by an Add-on
entry.content:
Hi @abb27 ,

The Addon framework, designed by a third-party technical team, may not be controlled by SAP standard settings when making changes or adjustments to the UI template.

Better if you could contact them to realign as per your requirement.

entry.title: Re: How to update key field in RAP managed scenario?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

I was able to workaround it with the managed with unmanaged save implementation.

Kind Regards,

Georgi

entry.title: Re: Bounce Details Amazon SES
entry.content:
Hello Joyca,

Unfortunately there is no BAdI or custom logic available for bounce classification in SAP. The bounce classification is done by ESP and their bounce types / codes / messages might change over time as explained by the following community blog so any custom logic would become obsolete after a while. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/sap-marketing-cloud-bounces-management-using-sinch-e-mail-365/ba-p/13523103

From my perspective, typo mistake leading to an invalid domain should be considered as an exceptional case rather than a recurrent scenario that must be tackled via a custom logic. There are alternatives proposed on the mentioned page above such as suppression list, target group filtering or segmentation. Also, there might be a way from Amazon dashboard to manage suppression list / invalid domains.

I can't comment on the your specific situation where you noticed a lot of missing info without investigating further on your system. Nevertheless I looked at our coding and the info is taken as is from Amazon. For instance,  the diagnostic code is always stored into content_data field, just to mention that field. The interaction reason might be empty if SAP can't match the bounce type / sub type given back from Amazon as explained in my previous reply.

I hope it helps,

Martin.

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports - Issue with bold and can grow op...
entry.content: Hi Ido, thanks for your input. I tried your solution already, but the behavior is the same. The text appears clipped. This is why I tried to assign bold as default, and I saw that the field automatically resized when I clicked on bold button. Strange behavior.

entry.title: Re: Adding additional Employee Profile fields in Manage Business Configuration - Employee Profile in
entry.content: I believe the field needs to be added in the data model to the sysAllUserDirectorySetting list of standard-element-refs.

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors e-Signature compliant in the UK
entry.content: I am looking for confirmation that the standard SF e-Signature offering (not DocuSign) for Onboarding is compliant in the UK.

entry.title: Re: Statement notification
entry.content:
Hello xavierlegarrec,

Is there a way to remove the Statement Notification through Home Page?

We tried to recall the statement but the system did not recalled also the Statement Notification through the home page.

Also, even when we clicked on the Notification link, it did not disappeared as it should have according to the Guide.

Please let me know how this is managed.

entry.title: Re: Statement notification
HU selection in outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need your assistance with an issue related to the selection of handling units in outbound delivery.

The context is as follows:

Our customer's packaging operations take place at a completely different time from the shipping process. As a result, handling units are created well in advance of shipping, and even well in advance of all sales orders. The HUs will be associated with the item when the picking task is processed.

This management approach requires us to ensure that the operator can manually select the "Source handling unit" during the picking task. However, in the current system, it is not possible to manually define the "Source handling unit."

The objective is twofold: first, the system must be able, based on the handling units created in advance, to automatically suggest a unit for an item during the picking task. Secondly, the operator should be able to manually select a unit to assign to the product if the suggested unit does not meet the specified requirement.

Do you have any ideas on how to deal with this ?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Finding the Correct CDS View for Manage Fixed Asset App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Background: Our client needs to perform a value comparison of an asset at the Ledger level within the same interface. They also require a field to display the differences in values between the ledgers.

I’m currently working on a project involving the Manage Fixed Asset app, and I need some assistance. Specifically, I’m trying to identify the correct Core Data Services (CDS) view that is used for loading the data displayed in the Asset Valuation screen.

I have a screenshot of the Asset Valuation screen, and I’d like to understand which CDS view is responsible for populating the various fields visible here:

If anyone has insights or can point me in the right direction, it would be greatly appreciated. Here are a few details for context:

  • App/Screen in Question: Manage Fixed Asset App, Asset Valuation Screen
  • Specific Data Fields: All fields related to Value comparison tab

Thank you in advance for your help!

Amar Modanwal.

entry.title: Extractor checker RSA2 - Error : CI_KALKTAB no active nametab
entry.content:
Hello,
When I test my data source for material calculations in RSA2, I receive the error: "No active Nametab for CI_KALKTAB present... Reactivate the ABAP/4 Dictionary object." In the extract structure, the structure is also empty (see screenshot).Can someone possibly help me here?

would be great if anyone has an idee what i can do.

 

Thanks a lot

Alex

entry.title: Re: Change field names(including key field) of custom table which has data
entry.content: Yes update the field name as you want and then go to se14 and click on activate and adjust it will update

entry.title: ST22 DUMP NOT GENERATED AFTER BACKGROUND JOB CANCELLED
entry.content:
Hi,

After getting the below error in background job log, but we couldn't see ST22 dump.

Job started
Step 001 started (program <program name>, variant <variant name>, user ID <user id>)
Internal session terminated with a runtime error HTTP_NO_MEMORY (see ST22)
Job cancelled

I'm getting below error when I tried to open the st22 dumps (this is the right after job cancellation)

The short dump <timestamp>1 <Profile name> <user id> no longer exists

Regards

Ajaruddin

entry.title: Re: How to extend Supplier Registration Invitation link i...
entry.content:
Hello,

By default is it set to 30 days , if you want to change then edit the field due date field in the questionnaire survey document -

 

For new registrations, the Due Date setting in the Timing Rules section of survey documents for external (supplier-facing) questionnaires defines the amount of time the supplier contact has to fill out the questionnaire after the invitation is sent. If the supplier contact does not fill and submit the questionnaire in that time, the questionnaire closes and the supplier contact can no longer edit it. Reinviting the supplier to register reopens all questionnaires in the registation and resets the due date clock. The default due date value is 30 days, but you can change that time period by editing the Due Date field in the questionnaire survey document. This setting is ignored in internal questionnaires, but it does apply to external registration questionnaires that are sent to internal recipients in an internal registration.

 

More details are available at the below help

https://help.sap.com/docs/strategic-sourcing/supplier-management-setup-and-administration/restrictions-requirements-and-helpful-hints-for-setting-up-supplier-registration-project-template-f3babc19dff34f56b6102172822fa386

entry.title: Integrate FSM with CPI and Proaxia simultaneously ?
entry.content: I was wondering if we could use both integrations via CPI and Proaxia with one FSM account.

entry.title: Directly call create object page or RAP action from Tile
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a RAP based Fiori app and deployed it to my On Prem system.

Now, we want to have a Fiori tile for this app, which should directly open the app in create mode. 

Also other apps wants to have cross app navigation and open this app in create mode.

Could you please help me to achieve this?

entry.title: Consolidation process
entry.content: How to define Consolidation unit types? percentages were set on Company level but we don't see the effect of this during our consolidation process on S4Hana public cloud 2408

entry.title: when we want to reserve a room in outlook, we insert its e-mail address and it automatically reserve
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

When we want to book a room in outlook, we send a mail to the e-mail address of the room and the room is automatically booked.
In the same way, Is it possible to book that room (with its e-mail adress) in the LMS when creating the session?

Thanks a lot.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to attach documents to a Journal Entry within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud from ABAP.
entry.content:
Dear @Sergio-Gracia,

I enjoyed reading your blog post and found your solution using the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV very insightful.

I'm curious if you have any experience with the cl_attachment_service_api class. I'd be grateful for any recommendations on when to choose it over the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV or if you know of any resources that explain how to use it.

Thank you in advance for any guidance you can provide!

King regards,

Dan
